name: 02-export-log-tab
evaluate: const s=window.__STORE__;s.dispatch({type:'jobs/addJob',payload:{id:'j1',kind:'scene',label:'beach.mp4'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/updateJob',payload:{id:'j1',progress:0.62,message:'Detecting cut at 37.4s',status:'running'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/updateJob',payload:{id:'j1',progress:0.62,message:'Detecting cut at 41.2s',status:'running'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/addJob',payload:{id:'j2',kind:'warp',label:'Verse'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/updateJob',payload:{id:'j2',progress:0.34,message:'Encoding segment 12/35',status:'running'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/updateJob',payload:{id:'j2',progress:0.34,message:'Encoding segment 14/35',status:'running'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/addJob',payload:{id:'j3',kind:'warp',label:'Intro'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/updateJob',payload:{id:'j3',status:'done'}});for(const b of document.querySelectorAll('.export-dialog__tab')){if((b.textContent||'').trim()==='Log'){b.click();break;}}
